ddls:
CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Average customer rating of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the menu item belongs to */,
  "nutritional_info_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nutritional information for the menu item */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the menu item is customizable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the menu item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the menu item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_nutritional_info_id FOREIGN KEY ("nutritional_info_id") REFERENCES nutritional_info ("nutritional_info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES menu_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ingredient in stock */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the ingredient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ingredient was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ingredient was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_ingredients" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "quantity_required" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ingredient required for the menu item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id", "ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of the order (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant location */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_info" (
  "nutritional_info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for nutritional information */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories in the menu item */,
  "fat" INTEGER /* Fat content in grams */,
  "carbohydrates" INTEGER /* Carbohydrate content in grams */,
  "protein" INTEGER /* Protein content in grams */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* Allergens in the menu item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the nutritional information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the nutritional information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutritional_info_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the supplier was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the location was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the location information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_id" INTEGER,
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER,
  "quantity" INTEGER,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "menu_item_id")
)
